verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Amazing love that always was Has washed my sins away A perfect Lamb was crucifid That I might stand justified I said, "Lord, I'm not worthy That You should die for me." He said, "Child, don't you worry I formed your destiny."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are blameless, blameless! For I have paid the price Shameless, innocent Filled with the life I gave Memory thought he had you bound But the evidence was never found You are beautiful and blameless

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Unfailing love with His own blood Has washed my sins away The perfect lamb was crucified That I might stand justified I said, "Lord, I'm not worthy, You know my history" But He said,"My love can't you see? You are a part of Me."

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Accusers rise on every side And demand justice be serve But the Mighty Judge With His own blood Has sovereignly declared
